evidence.snippet:
#### Enterprise
    Autonomy. Faster.
    Develop, evaluate, test and deploy mission autonomy with the most comprehensive AI-powered developer platform.
### Mission autonomy powered by Hivemind

items.notes: Hivemind is Shield AI's AI pilot/autonomy stack (EdgeOS, Pilot, Forge, Commander sub-products), deployed on V-BAT and licensed to third-party aircraft (MQ-20 Avenger, Firejet, X-62 VISTA)

evidence.snippet:
### ViDAR
Redefining ISR with the first passive, multi-domain AI-enabled optical sensor designed for use over sea and land.

#### ViDAR
        \[HARDWARE + SOFTWARE PACKAGE\]
        Unrivaled surveillance, day or night, across air, land and sea.
        ](https://shield.ai/vidar/)

items.notes: ViDAR is a passive multi-domain AI-enabled optical sensor (hardware + software); Tracker is AI object detection software for video

evidence.snippet: **SAN DIEGO (December 14, 2022) –** Shield AI, a fast-growing defense technology company building AI pilots for aircraft, today announced it has raised additional equity capital from the U.S. Innovative Technology Fund (USIT).

### Maritime UAS of choice
V-BAT was competitively selected for the U.S. Coast Guard Maritime Unmanned Aircraft System Services program. It has deployed on nearly every class of U.S. Navy ship and with all seven Marine Expeditionary Units (MEUs).

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Shield AI designs and manufactures complete UAS platforms (V-BAT in serial production, X-BAT VTOL fighter) while also licensing the Hivemind autonomy stack to third-party OEMs.

V-BAT was competitively selected for the U.S. Coast Guard Maritime Unmanned Aircraft System Services program. It has deployed on nearly every class of U.S. Navy ship and with all seven Marine Expeditionary Units (MEUs).

readiness.notes: V-BAT deployed with U.S. Coast Guard, Navy, and Marine Expeditionary Units. Hivemind is commercially deployed.

unresolved_questions: Street address not found in corpus (About page shows only a map image)
NDAA Sec 848/889 compliance not addressed in fetched corpus
Blue UAS status not mentioned in fetched corpus

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm street address and HQ details for Shield AI San Diego headquarters

tagline: Manufactures V-BAT and X-BAT VTOL aircraft for GPS/comms-denied ISR and contested environments; develops Hivemind autonomy platform (Enterprise, EdgeOS, Forge, Commander) and vision software (ViDAR, Tracker, Tracker C-UAS) for autonomous mission deployment. Production-ready airframes and software stack. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on operational fielding and program adoption thin.
